description:
The FingerPoseModifier component takes a ``Source`` and makes a copy of the finger pose data from it. It then modifies the copied data before making it the finger pose data of this component. This component in itself is a IFingerPoseSourceComponent.

For more information on finger pose sources, please see Finger Posing System.

fields.Source: The component to take finger pose data from and make a copy to modify and make this component's finger pose data.
fields.LeftOffsets: How to modify the left finger pose data before making it this component's finger pose data.
fields.RightOffsets: How to modify the right finger pose data before making it this component's finger pose data.

usage: Provide the component with data from another IFingerPoseSourceComponent to add extra offsets onto. This component can be used as a IFingerPoseSourceComponent for other components.
